items.title: LIVE: Giant pandas in Hong Kong enjoy Christmas treats
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Panda pair An An and Ke Ke, sent to Hong Kong from mainland China, enjoy special treats as they mark their first Christmas.

#panda #hongkong #live

items.title: Pope Francis to officially open Pilgrims of Hope Jubilee on December 24 I AP explains
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
When Pope Francis formally opens the Holy Year, he will launch a dizzying 12-month calendar of events that include special Jubilee masses for the faithful from all walks of life. Read more: https://bit.ly/4gne69E
(AP video by Paolo Santalucia)

items.title: LIVE: Outside court as Luigi Mangione appears to face state charges in UnitedHealthcare CEO’s death
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Luigi Mangione, the man accused of fatally shooting the CEO of UnitedHealthcare, is expected to be arraigned in a Manhattan court on murder and terror charges in a state case that will run parallel to his federal prosecution. Mangione was formally charged last week by the Manhattan district attorney with multiple counts of murder, including murder as an act of terrorism. Read more: https://bit.ly/41Oyex1

#luigimangione #brianthompson #unitedhealthcare #newyork #usa #news

items.title: Many Americans have come to rely on Chinese-made drones. Now lawmakers want to ban them
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
North Carolina farmer Russell Hedrick is critical of lawmakers pushing for a ban of Chinese manufactured drones, which he uses on his fields to increase efficiency and cut costs. Read more: https://bit.ly/4gOVsHK
(AP video: Erik Verduzco, Serkan Gurbuz)

#drones #china #usa #technology #news

items.title: LIVE: Germany mourns victims of Christmas market attack
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
People lay flowers and light candles in front of the Johannis church in Magdeburg after four women and a 9-year-old boy were killed and 200 people were injured when a man drove into a Christmas market teeming with holiday shoppers in the German city. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3VUmXHH

#germany #magdeburg #live

items.title: Devastating oil spill ravages local community and threatens livelihoods in Nigeria
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Fecurring oil spills from the Ogboinbiri/Tebidaba pipeline have been threatening farmlands, and have contaminated swamps, streams, and farmlands, crippling fishing and farming - the community’s primary sources of livelihood.

#oilspill #nigeria #africa #news

items.title: A ride along with ICE agents shines a light on how Trump's proposed mass deportations may work
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
About a dozen immigration officers from the enforcement and removal operations unit recently gathered in the Bronx for a pre-dawn mission. ICE gave The Associated Press the opportunity to accompany ERO agents for a look at what goes into the job they do. Read more: https://bit.ly/4iP843e
(AP video: Joseph B. Frederick)

items.title: Rome's iconic Trevi Fountain reopens after maintenance works
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
After undergoing months of maintenance, the iconic Trevi Fountain, one of Rome’s most celebrated landmarks, reopened to the public on Sunday, just in time for the upcoming Jubilee Year, which is expected to draw millions of visitors to the Eternal City. Read more: https://bit.ly/4frPKKN
(AP video shot by Isaia Montelione. Produced by Maria Grazia Murru)

#trevifountain #rome #news

items.title: Ecologists warn Spain's next big rainstorm could wash tonnes of plastic into sea
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Powerful Mediterranean storms which devastated Valencia have had another consequence: transporting plastic pollution to the sea. It's estimated thousands of tonnes of plastic waste from agriculture are dumped illegally in the dry riverbeds of Almería province in Spain every year. As climate change makes these storms, or DANAs, more frequent and more powerful, this means more plastic is winding up in the Mediterranean.
(AP video by Serge Cartwright)

#pollution #plastic #rainstorm #environment #spain #news

items.title: Ethnic violence in India's northeast has displaced thousands who continue to live in dire conditions
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Violence erupted last year between the majority Meitei community and minority Kuki-Zo tribes. The conflict, which has stretched to 19 months, has claimed more than 250 lives and displaced at least 60,000 people. Read more: https://bit.ly/4gQCmkb
(AP video by Rishi Lekhi)

#meiteis #kukizo #india #news

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:

items.title: LIVE: Japan’s Honda and Nissan announce plans to merge, forming world’s 3rd largest automaker
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
The two companies said they had signed a memorandum of understanding and that smaller Nissan alliance member Mitsubishi Motors also had agreed to join the talks on integrating their businesses. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3ZOmCaH

#honda #nissan #live

items.title: Trump threatens to try to take back Panama Canal. Panama's president balks at suggestion
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Donald Trump suggested Sunday that his new administration could try to regain control of the Panama Canal that the United States “foolishly” ceded to its Central American ally, contending that shippers are charged “ridiculous” fees to pass through the vital transportation channel linking the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3VQbcBW

#panama #donaldtrump #panamacanal #news
